TSP NameTSP DUNSPost DatePost Time
KERN RIVER GAS TRANSMISSION COMPANY 621617372 06/23/2026 10:52:28




"Operationally Available Capacity" on this Operational Capacity report is subject to potential limitations by lateral, mainline and/or compressor capacity. There are no guarantees expressed or implied that these capacities are or will be available for service. Please contact your Marketing and Customer Services representative or the scheduling hotline at (801) 937-6111 if you have questions.
